brand_identity.name: StudyBoard
brand_identity.tagline: The Flow State Engine for Students
brand_identity.description: A task management platform that merges academic rigor with 'lo-fi beats' calmness. Designed to reduce anxiety while increasing output.

instructions: Headings (Outfit): Use for all H1-H4. Tracking tight (-0.02em). Weight: Bold (700) or Medium (500).
Body (Inter): Use for all UI text, cards, and inputs. Tracking normal. Weight: Regular (400) and SemiBold (600).
Caps: All 'OVERLINE' or 'LABEL' text must be Uppercase, Text-XS, Font-Bold, Tracking-Widest.

usage_rules: Never use pure black (#000000). Use #09090B or #18181B.
Primary color is for ACTION (Buttons, Active States). Do not use it for backgrounds.
Use 'Accent' colors for Tags and Priority labels.
Borders in dark mode must be subtle (#27272A).

key_sections: Hero: Asymmetrical split. Left: Large Type + CTA. Right: 3D/Abstract Visual or Floating UI Cards.
Features: Bento Grid. Mix of square (1x1), tall (1x2), and wide (2x1) cards.

structure: Top Bar: Glassmorphism (Backdrop blur), simple breadcrumbs + User Profile.
Board Canvas: Horizontal scrolling, full height.
Lists: Fixed width (e.g., w-80), full height, internal scroll for cards.

buttons.default: rounded-full font-medium px-6 py-2 transition-all active:scale-95

cards.task_card: bg-card border border-border/50 rounded-lg p-3 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:border-primary/30 transition-all cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing group
cards.feature_card: bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300

inputs.style: rounded-md border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

visual_enhancers.gradients: Subtle mesh gradients for backgrounds (e.g., 'bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-50 via-white to-cyan-50' in light mode).

rules: All interactive elements must scale down slightly (scale-95) on click.
Lists must use 'AnimatePresence' for smooth entry/exit of cards.
Drag and drop must have a 'ghost' overlay with 0.8 opacity and scale-105.

images_and_assets.logo_placeholder: Use a simple geometric shape (e.g., a hexagon or stacked squares) + 'StudyBoard' text.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: Run 'yarn add framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge @dnd-kit/core @dnd-kit/sortable @dnd-kit/utilities lucide-react'
THEME TOGGLE: Implement a ThemeProvider context that toggles the 'dark' class on the HTML element.
SHADCN: Customize the 'components/ui' files to match the 'component_styles' defined above. Do not use default radius.
DRAG & DROP: Use @dnd-kit for accessible, robust drag and drop. Ensure 'DragOverlay' is used for smooth visual feedback.
RESPONSIVENESS: Mobile is critical. Boards must scroll horizontally on mobile. Sidebar must become a hamburger menu.
QUALITY CHECK: Before finishing, verify that text contrast is accessible (APCA/WCAG) in both light and dark modes.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
